title: Database Design Basics
description: Covers normalization, keys, indexing, and relational modeling concepts.

questions.question: What is the main goal of normalization?
Which normal form removes partial dependency on a composite key?
Which index type speeds up searches on multiple columns?
What does denormalization typically trade for performance?
Which schema is common in data warehouses?
What is a surrogate key?
options: A key derived from business meaning

questions.question: When should you consider sharding?
options: When dataset size or traffic exceeds a single node

questions.question: Which statement about indexes is true?
options: They can slow down insert/update operations
They replace the need for primary keys
